licenseStatus: Project-authored procedural meshes; no source media copied or embedded.
policy: Use restricted Memphis-specific sources as human research context only.
Use open/CC0/public-domain references only for future dataset experiments.
Runtime GLBs in this kit are generated geometry with procedural materials.

assets.label: Detailed Nile arrival cargo boat
notes: Project-authored hull, ribs, mast, sail, rope, oars, jars, and cargo.
Broadly inspired by Nile craft and riverine material culture; not copied from source media.
assets.licenseStatus: Project-authored synthetic/procedural model; no source media copied.

assets.label: Date palm and bank vegetation cluster
notes: Project-authored segmented trunks, fronds, fruit clusters, and small undergrowth.
Designed as repeated bank vegetation for the Nile arrival scene.
assets.licenseStatus: Project-authored synthetic/procedural model; no source media copied.

assets.label: Dense Nile reed bank cluster
notes: Project-authored reeds, seed heads, bank grasses, and wet-bank silhouettes.
Used to soften the water edge and add parallax detail.
assets.licenseStatus: Project-authored synthetic/procedural model; no source media copied.

assets.label: Authored dense hero street corridor
notes: Project-authored two-row mudbrick street corridor with inward-facing facades.
Includes worn doors, small windows, awnings, roof clutter, plaster patches, cracks, pottery, baskets, sacks, straw, stones, and work surfaces.
Layout follows docs/design/memphis-hero-district-plan.md and avoids overlapping architecture systems.
assets.licenseStatus: Project-authored synthetic/procedural model; no source media copied.

assets.label: Mudbrick residential house cluster
notes: Project-authored compact houses, parapets, stairs, doors, niches, plaster bands, and painted panels.
Uses Kom el-Fakhry / Mit Rahina only as human-reference context.
assets.licenseStatus: Project-authored synthetic/procedural model; no source media copied.

assets.label: Residential street props and awning details
notes: Project-authored jars, baskets, mats, awnings, ropes, benches, crates, and small vessels.
Decorative density pass for the living-city route.
assets.licenseStatus: Project-authored synthetic/procedural model; no source media copied.

assets.label: Animated early Memphis street actors
notes: Project-authored articulated GLB figures with walking, carrying, idle, and work-loop object animation.
Clothing is intentionally restrained: plain linen kilts and sheath-like linen garments suitable for an Old Kingdom visual direction.
This is a first browser-safe character pass; future work should replace it with expert-reviewed skeletal character rigs.
